languages.text: "Да, Нунциус, я уверен. Теперь умилостиви Движущую Силу вознесением Второго Гальванического Гимна. Провожу обряд преумножения напряжения. Десять процентов, стабильно. Двадцать процентов..." {n}Веки Эоганна закрываются, а голова безвольно падает на грудь.{/n}

"Yes, Nuncius, I am sure. Now propitiate the Motive Force with the offering of the Second Galvanic Hymn. Conducting the rite of voltage multiplication. Ten percent, steady. Twenty percent..." {n}Eogunn's eyelids close, and his head drops limply onto his chest.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Да, Нунциус, я уверен. Теперь умилостиви Движущую Силу вознесением Второго Гальванического Гимна. Провожу обряд преумножения напряжения. Десять процентов, стабильно. Двадцать процентов..." {n}Веки Эоганна закрываются, а голова безвольно падает на грудь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Yes, Nuncius, I am sure. Now propitiate the Motive Force with the offering of the Second Galvanic Hymn. Conducting the rite of voltage multiplication. Ten percent, steady. Twenty percent..." {n}Eogunn's eyelids close, and his head drops limply onto his chest.{/n}

"Yes, Nuncius, I am sure. Now propitiate the Motive Force with the offering of the Second Galvanic Hymn. Conducting the rite of voltage multiplication. Ten percent, steady. Twenty percent..." {n}Eogunn's eyelids close, and his head drops limply onto his chest.{/n}

"Yes, Nuncius, I am sure. Now propitiate the Motive Force with the offering of the Second Galvanic Hymn. Conducting the rite of voltage multiplication. Ten percent, steady. Twenty percent..." {n}Eogunn's eyelids close, and his head drops limply onto his chest.{/n}

languages.text: “是的，努恩修斯，我确认无误。现在，以《第二流电赞美诗》安抚源力，执行电压倍增仪式。百分之十……稳定。百分之二十……”{n}伊奥贡的眼睑缓缓合上，脑袋无力地垂落在胸前。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Nuncius, I am sure. Now propitiate the Motive Force with the offering of the Second Galvanic Hymn. Conducting the rite of voltage multiplication. Ten percent, steady. Twenty percent..." {n}Eogunn's eyelids close, and his head drops limply onto his chest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “是的，努恩修斯，我确认无误。现在，以《第二流电赞美诗》安抚源力，执行电压倍增仪式。百分之十……稳定。百分之二十……”{n}伊奥贡的眼睑缓缓合上，脑袋无力地垂落在胸前。{/n}

languages.text: « Oui, Nuncius, je suis sûr de moi. Maintenant, apaise la Force Motrice avec le second hymne galvanique. Rituel de multiplication de la tension électrique en cours. Dix pour cent, stable. Vingt pour cent... » {n}Les paupières d'Eogunn se ferment et sa tête tombe sans force sur sa poitrine.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Nuncius, I am sure. Now propitiate the Motive Force with the offering of the Second Galvanic Hymn. Conducting the rite of voltage multiplication. Ten percent, steady. Twenty percent..." {n}Eogunn's eyelids close, and his head drops limply onto his chest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Oui, Nuncius, je suis sûr de moi. Maintenant, apaise la Force Motrice avec le second hymne galvanique. Rituel de multiplication de la tension électrique en cours. Dix pour cent, stable. Vingt pour cent... » {n}Les paupières d'Eogunn se ferment et sa tête tombe sans force sur sa poitrine.{/n}

languages.text: «Sí, Nuncius, estoy seguro. Ahora propicia la Fuerza Motriz ofreciendo el Segundo Himno Galvánico. Ejecutando rito de multiplicación voltaica. Diez por ciento, estable. Veinte por ciento...». {n}Eogunn cierra los ojos y su cabeza cae sobre su pecho.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Nuncius, I am sure. Now propitiate the Motive Force with the offering of the Second Galvanic Hymn. Conducting the rite of voltage multiplication. Ten percent, steady. Twenty percent..." {n}Eogunn's eyelids close, and his head drops limply onto his chest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Sí, Nuncius, estoy seguro. Ahora propicia la Fuerza Motriz ofreciendo el Segundo Himno Galvánico. Ejecutando rito de multiplicación voltaica. Diez por ciento, estable. Veinte por ciento...». {n}Eogunn cierra los ojos y su cabeza cae sobre su pecho.{/n}

languages.text: "Evet Nuncius, eminim. Şimdi İkinci Galvaniz İlahisi adağıyla Devinim Gücü'nü teskin et. Voltaj çarpımı ayinini yönetiyorum. Yüzde on, sabit. Yüzde yirmi..." {n}Eogunn'un göz kapakları kapanıyor, başı cansız bir şekilde göğsüne düşüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Nuncius, I am sure. Now propitiate the Motive Force with the offering of the Second Galvanic Hymn. Conducting the rite of voltage multiplication. Ten percent, steady. Twenty percent..." {n}Eogunn's eyelids close, and his head drops limply onto his chest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Evet Nuncius, eminim. Şimdi İkinci Galvaniz İlahisi adağıyla Devinim Gücü'nü teskin et. Voltaj çarpımı ayinini yönetiyorum. Yüzde on, sabit. Yüzde yirmi..." {n}Eogunn'un göz kapakları kapanıyor, başı cansız bir şekilde göğsüne düşüyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ja, Nuncius, ich bin mir sicher. Besänftige die Antriebskraft jetzt mit dem Opfer der zweiten galvanischen Hymne. Führe den Ritus der Spannungsmultiplikation aus. Zehn Prozent, stabil. Zwanzig Prozent ..." {n}Eogunns Augenlider schließen sich und sein Kopf sinkt kraftlos auf seine Brust.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Nuncius, I am sure. Now propitiate the Motive Force with the offering of the Second Galvanic Hymn. Conducting the rite of voltage multiplication. Ten percent, steady. Twenty percent..." {n}Eogunn's eyelids close, and his head drops limply onto his chest.{/n}

Zehn Prozent, stabil. Zwanzig Prozent ..." {n}Eogunns Augenlider schließen sich und sein Kopf sinkt kraftlos auf seine Brust.{/n}

languages.text: 「ええ、ヌンキウス、確かです。では、第二ガルヴァニック讃歌の供物をもって、モーティヴ・フォースをなだめてください。電圧増幅の儀を執り行います。十パーセント、安定。二十パーセント……」{n}エオガンの瞼が閉じ、頭ががくりと胸の上に垂れる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, Nuncius, I am sure. Now propitiate the Motive Force with the offering of the Second Galvanic Hymn. Conducting the rite of voltage multiplication. Ten percent, steady. Twenty percent..." {n}Eogunn's eyelids close, and his head drops limply onto his chest.{/n}
